saveAndSee: Save and see your changes instantly.
checkinAlreadyCompleted: Check-in for this reservation has already been completed.

CheckinForm.completingForReservation: You are completing check-in for reservation #{reservationId}
CheckinForm.guestCountHint: Add all guests who will be staying. Each guest must provide their personal details.
CheckinForm.reviewDescription: Please review the information below before submitting.

dataCollectionNotice.title: Information on Processing of Personal Data
dataCollectionNotice.text: For the purposes of your accommodation and in accordance with the applicable legislation of the Czech Republic (in particular Act No. 565/1990 Coll., on local fees, and Act No. 326/1999 Coll., on the residence of foreign nationals in the Czech Republic), we are obliged to collect and store the following personal data. This data will be used exclusively to fulfill legal obligations and for the internal needs of the accommodation provider related to your stay.
dataCollectionNotice.legalBasis: Processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the controller is subject.

gender.label: Gender
gender.explanation: Gender information is required for statistical purposes and to comply with legal obligations.

consent.label: Consent to Personal Data Processing
consent.text: I declare that all information I have provided is true and I consent to its processing for accommodation purposes.

success.title: Check-in Successfully Completed
success.message: Thank you for completing the online check-in for reservation #{reservationId}. We wish you a pleasant stay!

error.alreadyCheckedIn: Check-in for this reservation has already been completed.
error.reservationCancelled: This reservation has been cancelled and check-in cannot be performed.
error.reservationNotEligible: This reservation is not eligible for online check-in.
error.reservationNotFound: Reservation with this number was not found.
error.submissionFailed: Form submission failed. Please try again.

validation.dateFormat: Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.consentRequired: Your consent is required to proceed.
validation.atLeastOneGuest: At least one guest is required.

checkoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to check out reservation #{bookNumber}?
name: Name
deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the property {name}? This action cannot be undone.
deleteReservationConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the reservation for {guest} (check-in {checkIn})? This action cannot be undone.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
